retrieved_result: Learn the Ropes < All Phrases Learn the Ropes Sep 4, 2014Learn the ropes means to learn how to do something. Example of use: “ Once I learn the ropes at my new job, I won’t be so nervous and I’ll be very good at the work I do.”Interesting fact Not surprisingly, the origin of the idiom “learn the ropes” is nautical.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses the idiom 'learn the ropes' and is unrelated to Docker or setup for beginners.
